author: fwyzard
body:
#### PR description:

Extend the `convertToRaw` to support reading streamer files (.dat), as well as edm files (.root).

#### PR validation:

Tested converting streamer files from run 404926 to .raw format, and running the heavy ions HLT menu on the result.

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

To be backported to 17.0.x for Run 3 developments.
title: Extend convertToRaw to support streamer files
